imageAlt: iOS 26 minimum UI updates roadmap item preview image
title: iOS 26 minimum UI updates
summaryBody: Updating the iOS app so that users using iOS 26 will have a non-buggy experience once we stop blocking this latest OS from running our app. This will also significantly modernise the app UI/interactions for users to fit nicely into the wider iOS ecosystem.
detailBody: Updating the iOS app so that users using iOS 26 will have a non-buggy experience once we stop blocking this latest OS from running our app. This will also significantly modernise the app UI/interactions for users to fit nicely into the wider iOS ecosystem.
